title: Russia scales back Moscow Victory Day parade, blaming threat from Ukraine
summary_full: Russia says the annual commemoration of Soviet victory in World War Two will not feature military vehicles or cadets.
summary_public: Russia says the annual commemoration of Soviet victory in World War Two will not feature military vehicles or cadets.
